title: Command Cockpit Node Focus Lens
summary: Made the Command Cockpit Quest level map selectable so node details expand inside the board instead of creating another scroll row.
changes: Adds per-lane Quest node focus state for World, Level, Checkpoint, Gate, and Next sockets.
Renders Quest field cells as selectable board buttons with focused-state styling and accessible pressed state.
Adds a compact focus lens under the Quest map so each node reveals title and meta detail inside the existing cockpit board.
